description_text: Product Description 2 Pcs Carbon Fiber Color Car Bumper Spoiler Rear Splitter Diffuser Lip Universal Specification: -Type: Car Rear Lip & Body Side Skirts -Color: Glossy Carbon Fiber -Side Skirt Length: 35cm/13.8in -Material: Polyurethane (ABS) -Position: Rear Lip Or Side Skirt Extension -Fitment Type: Direct Replacement Feature: -Universal modified rear lip and side skirt for car sedan. -100% brand new direct replacement as shown in the picture -Comes with 2PC Rear lip wrap angle splitters -Please measure your Rear lip wrap angle and make sure these splitters will fit -Custom fit most vehicles, product may require drilling holes and apply bolts to attach to your bumper -Use double side adhesive tape or drill holes and bolt on to your bumper (bolts are included) -Give your car a more aggressive racing look -New and nice qulity, durable to use. -Easy installation and easy to use. -A Perfect Aftermarket Replacement. Package: Pair Car Bumper Spoiler Rear Lip 10Pcs Bolts Note: - Please allow 0-1CM differs due to manual measurement. - Due to the different display and different light, the picture may not reflect the actual color of the item. Thanks for your understanding. Payment Shipping Returns Contact Us Payment should be completed within 4 days after buyer places the order,or else an unpaid case will be opened in order to cancel the transaction. If you can not pay in time, please contact us. All of the items will be shipped to buyer's EBAY address,please confirm your address on Ebay before you buy. Your order will be usually shipped out the same or next business days once the payment is made and cleared. powered by
